channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Next Destiny 2 Update Will Be The Last
item.content:encoded:
Bungie announced today that the next Destiny 2 update will be the final update for the game as the team moves working onto Marathon and other, unspecified projects.

Destiny 2: Monument of Triumph for 2026 will be released on June 9th, and will be available to all players and celebrate the history of the entire game. This is only one part of the update however, as while the Monument of Triumph's set of goodies are welcome especially when this expanded, there's more to see before the game enters maintenance mode.

What is in the final Destiny 2 update?

A goal of the update is that there will be new content for everyone, regardless of how they like to play. This is a brief rundown of some of the things they mentioned:

  • Story closure points in the Monument of Triumph
  • Return and refreshment of the Director
  • Pantheon 2.0 brings a new pantheon with new additions on June 9, 13, and 16
  • All Raid and Dungeon weapon and armor have been revised to modern standards
    • Crafted weapons will have an upgrade path for tiers 1-5
  • Weekly featured dungeons and raids return
  • Destination weapons and armors are being revised to modern standards
  • Distortions are a new addition to Destinations that will bring new variety and rewards to them
  • New Sandbox abilities and ability updates
  • All Exotic Armors upgraded to tier 5
  • Some exotic armors and weapons are receiving further revisions
  • Three new Crucible playmodes, one via playlist and two via private match
  • Iron Banner will run every 4 weeks, with new weapons and armor to earn
  • Heavy Metal returns with a third vehicle type, a new map, and more
  • Sparrow Racing League returns permanently.

This is only some of the high points, and Bungie also hints that other additions have yet to be revealed as they are trying to leave the game in a strong state.

Is Destiny 2 Shutting Down?

While Destiny 2 updates are ending, Destiny 2 itself will still be available, much like Destiny is. Coming on June 9th, Destiny 2 will be bundled into a single purchase featuring campaigns, dungeon keys, the anniversary pack, and more. Additionally, individual content packs will be permanently marked down so that if you missed something and wanted to give it a shot cheaper you'll be able to do so.

A longtime lover of speculative fiction, in almost all its forms, Don joined TechRaptor in 2014 on a whim sending in an application as he was looking for… More about Don
